summary: A warm Bay‑Area vibe captured on a nicely balanced matrix recording, with Sugaree shining as the standout moment.
review: The matrix source delivers a clear and enjoyable listening experience despite some mic level quirks, letting the sunny, breezy atmosphere of the show come through. Reviewers highlight Sugaree as a perfect soundtrack to the day and note the set’s overall hot energy, making this a recommended listen even if the ending could have been stronger.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive reviews (5‑star and 4‑star) praise both performance and the matrix mix; minor recording imbalances keep it from perfect but still a strong show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Usborne’s matrix work blends a too‑hot board mic feed with distant audience ambience; overall clear and pleasant, though some mic overload and distance issues are noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Interesting set list with a warm, sunny feel; the show is described as "hot" and energetic, though some wish the ending had more punch.
